I'm now trying to figure out if it's possible to write to the tables.\\n\\n\\n\",\"tool_calls\":[{\"name\":\"write_to_file\",\"args\":{\"CodeContent\":\"\\\"const { createClient } = require('@supabase/supabase-js');\\\\nconst fs = require('fs');\\\\nconst path = require('path');\\\\n\\\\n// Load env variables from .env.local\\\\nconst envPath = path.join(__dirname, '../.env.local');\\\\nconst envContent = fs.readFileSync(envPath, 'utf-8');\\\\nconst env = {};\\\\nenvContent.split('\\\\\\\\n').forEach(line =\u003e {\\\\n  const parts = line.split('=');\\\\n  if (parts.length \u003e= 2) {\\\\n    const key = parts[0].trim();\\\\n    const val = parts.slice(1).join('=').trim();\\\\n    env[key] = val;\\\\n  }\\\\n});\\\\n\\\\nconst supabaseUrl = env['NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL'];\\\\nconst supabaseAnonKey = env['NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY'];\\\\nconst supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseAnonKey);\\\\n\\\\nasync function run() {\\\\n  try {\\\\n    console.log('Fetching all products to delete...');\\\\n    const { data: products, error: fetchError } = await supabase\\\\n      .from('website_pooja_products')\\\\n      .select('id, name');\\\\n\\\\n    if (fetchError) {\\\\n      throw fetchError;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    console.log(`Found ${products.length} products to delete.`);\\\\n
